data.body: AC2 COMPLETE (green path): change 201 on feature/s3-ci2 (well-formed, rebar-ticket trailer) got LLM-Review=MAX AND Verified=MAX (CI run 28645046830). So post-fix a feature/* change earns BOTH gate votes end-to-end. Full AC2 evidence chain: 198 (pre-fix) = no CI, no Verified; 200 (post-fix, no trailer) = CI dispatched, Verified-1 (gate correctly failing a bad commit); 201 (post-fix, trailer) = CI dispatched, Verified+1. The replication fix is proven. Remaining S3: AC3 (merge change CI on the merge tree), AC4 (Verified re-runs on re-merge), AC5 (concurrency), + commit S3 code (replication.config + g2p ini dispatch note) via Gerrit.
